description: EAN-Search is a product barcode lookup service that lets users search a large database of EAN, GTIN, UPC, and ISBN codes and related product information. It offers paid accounts for higher-volume access, API usage, and AI integrations.
summary: EAN-Search exposes a token-authenticated REST API, a Bearer-authenticated GraphQL API at `https://api.ean-search.org/graphql`, and an OAuth-protected streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://www.ean-search.org/mcp`.
